title: peridiscaceae
intro: The rank Peridiscaceae refers to a family of flowering plants. It is a taxonomic group that includes approximately 15 genera and 100 species, primarily found in tropical and subtropical regions of the world. The plants within the Peridiscaceae family are characterized by their showy, often fragrant flowers and woody vines or shrubs. The family is part of the order Saxifragales and is known for its unique, often complex inflorescences.
